_comment: Resolved IMAGE ids (MeshPart.TextureID) for the 2026-07-16 19-item flora set (plants/rocks/trees folders). Decals in flora_set2_texture_decal_ids.json, meshes in flora_set2_model_ids.json. Prebaked in ReplicatedStorage.Assets.Models.Flora; desert_tree/pine_tree/oak_tree replaced the prior exemplars (kept as *_legacy).
